summary: When the Next.js app starts, the root layout loads the home page, which renders the Quotes component. The Quotes component calls a data‑fetching function in lib/utils/query.ts, which uses a PrismaClient singleton created in lib/db.ts to establish a connection to the PostgreSQL database and execute a query. The Prisma client then communicates directly with the database to retrieve data.

nodes.title: Root Layout
nodes.explanation: Loads global CSS and provides the outer HTML structure for the app.

nodes.title: Home Page
nodes.explanation: Renders the AddQuote button and the Quotes component, triggering data fetching on page load.

nodes.title: Quotes Component
nodes.explanation: Calls the getQuote function from lib/utils/query.ts to fetch a quote from the database.

nodes.title: Query Service
nodes.explanation: Contains getQuote which uses the Prisma client from lib/db.ts to query the Quotes table.

nodes.title: Prisma Client Initialization
nodes.explanation: Creates a singleton PrismaClient instance, establishing a connection to the database using the DATABASE_URL environment variable.

nodes.title: Database Connection
nodes.explanation: The Prisma client sends SQL queries to the PostgreSQL database and returns results to the app.
